title: Rig Veda 1.1: Hymn to Agni
description: The opening hymn of the Rig Veda — the oldest text in any Indo-European language.
introduction: The opening hymn of the Rig Veda — the oldest text in any Indo-European language.

translation.original_text: agním īḷe puróhitaṃ yajñásya devám ṛtvíjam | hótāraṃ ratnadhā́tamam
translation.text: I praise Agni, the household priest, the divine minister of the sacrifice, the chief priest, the bestower of treasure.
